category_sources: source_facts.description says Rancher Kubernetes Engine is a Kubernetes installer; official RKE docs identify it as RKE1 and official GitHub repository describes Rancher Kubernetes Engine.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands RKE as Rancher Kubernetes Engine; official GitHub repository title uses Rancher Kubernetes Engine.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the dedicated official RKE documentation domain; official GitHub README is a supporting documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/rancher/rke; per instruction it was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Kubernetes installer; source_facts.executables lists the rke CLI; official docs are for RKE1.
